Weakness.Name: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
Weakness.Description: Improper neutralization of input leads to cross-site scripting.
Weakness.Extended_Description: The application fails to sanitize attacker-controlled data before rendering.

Weakness.Name: Improper Input Validation
Weakness.Description: Improper input validation allows unsafe values to reach critical sinks.
Weakness.Extended_Description: Input validation should reject malformed parameters before use.

Weakness.Name: Out-of-bounds Write
Weakness.Description: Improper neutralization of array indices can lead to memory corruption.
Weakness.Extended_Description: Out-of-bounds writes can overwrite adjacent memory and enable code execution.
